ExceptionType.Label: Example Xyna Exception

Meta.Documentation:
This is an example of a Xyna Exception datatype. It corresponds to a Java Exception. It is always an extension of core.exception.XynaExceptionBase.
A Xyna Exception can have messages in English and German to improve the user experience.

ExceptionType.MessageText: Ein Exeption Nachricht kann die Attribute %0% und %1% gemäß ihrer Reihenfolge referenzieren.
An exception message can reference the attributes %0% and %1% based on the order they are defined.
